confidence.explanation: All core Folio and Invoice ACs verified (charges-only table, payment summary at bottom, PAYMENT type with CASH method, running balance math, item/desc fields). One deduction: TC-0608-006 (SOLI Cancelled handling) cannot be fully tested — seed booking BK_J755DICT has no CANCELLED SOLIs. UV-5 (a11y) skipped in headless mode. UV-6 skipped (no baseline). Known fix confirmed: Invoice Number now TOTEWCLQEH, not 'INV-608.00'.

notes: MRDT rate is 2% for Totem Lodge (API confirmed) — product context says 3% but this is hotel-specific configuration, not a code bug
Invoice Number prior bug (showing 'INV-608.00') is FIXED — now correctly shows 'TOTEWCLQEH'
payment_type field present on DEPOSIT line items with CASH type — DB1.7 requirement verified
Rooms amount in Invoice Summary ($119.00) vs Rooms table Est. Total ($238.00) — SO only has 1 room-night billed, booking spans 2 nights; seed data confirmed
No CANCELLED SOLIs in seed booking — TC-0608-006 needs separate seed data with cancelled item

test_cases.title: Folio charge table renders charges only (no inline payment/deposit rows)
test_cases.note: Folio charge table has exactly 1 row: '326 Room | 07/15/2026 | 07/17/2026 | 1 | $119.00 | $119.00'. No DEPOSIT or PAYMENT rows inline. Item field populated: '326 Room'. PASS.

test_cases.title: Folio payment and deposit summary displayed at bottom
test_cases.note: Separate bottom table shows: Deposits $10.00 | Payments $0.00 | Credits $0.00 | Balance Due $126.85. These are NOT in the charge table — correctly shown as summary section. PASS.

test_cases.title: Folio math: Subtotal + taxes = Total; Total minus payments/deposits = Balance Due
test_cases.note: $119.00 + $9.52 + $0.00 + $5.95 + $2.38 = $136.85. $136.85 - $10.00 = $126.85. All math reconciles. MRDT 2% is hotel-configured rate. PASS.

test_cases.title: Invoice renders with PAYMENT type correctly displayed
test_cases.note: Invoice Number: TOTEWCLQEH (not 'INV-608.00' — prior bug FIXED). DEPOSIT rows show Payment Method: CASH. API confirms payment_type: {id:3, name:'CASH'} on both DEPOSIT line items. Payments tab shows Transaction Type options (Deposit/Payment/Manual) and Payment Method options (Credit Card/Cash/Debit Card/Cheque/Interac). PASS.

test_cases.title: Invoice balance math reconciles (running balance and total)
test_cases.note: Running balance: $119 → $128.52 → $130.90 → $136.85 → $131.85 → $126.85. Final $126.85 = API total_due 12685 cents. All 6 rows reconcile. PASS.

test_cases.title: SOLI Cancelled status handled in Folio and Invoice
test_cases.note: Seed booking BK_J755DICT has no CANCELLED SOLIs — all line items status: 'NEW'. Cannot verify positive display of cancelled items. No rendering crash observed. Recommend seeding a CANCELLED SOLI to verify display treatment.

test_cases.title: Item and description fields populated correctly in Folio line items
test_cases.note: API: name='326 Room' (populated), desc='Hotel Room' (populated). DEPOSIT items: name='Payment - DEPOSIT CASH'. FE Invoice Description column shows 'name' field values. All fields populated. PASS.

test_cases.title: Console error scan
test_cases.note: 1 error: Cognito favicon 404 (xin-auth-np.auth.ca-central-1.amazoncognito.com/favicon.ico) — third-party auth page static asset, allowlisted. Zero errors from xin-np.wbee.ca. PASS.

test_cases.title: Network error scan
test_cases.note: All 10 captured API calls returned 200: /user/profile, /booking/search, /so/invoice x3, /inventory/search x2, /so/folio x2, /so/transactions. No 4xx/5xx. PASS.

test_cases.title: Broken image/asset scan
test_cases.note: Folio and Invoice are print-oriented modals with no tags for room assets. Hotel logo uses CSS/icon components. No broken asset check required for these print dialogs. No failures observed.

test_cases.title: Document lifecycle smoke
test_cases.note: EXEMPT — Folio and Invoice are read-only renders. D1-D5 gates do not apply. API round-trip verified: GET /so/invoice and /so/folio both return 200 with correct persisted data.

test_cases.title: Accessibility scan
test_cases.note: Skipped — axe-core not available in headless Playwright MCP mode. Manual a11y review recommended for print dialogs.

test_cases.title: Snapshot drift check
test_cases.note: Skipped — no baseline-stable run exists for INV-608 (first run). Visual regression baseline not established.
